## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix

## How was this tested?

- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows existing style (defensive degradation, no hard crashes on missing data)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under the "Unreleased" section
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or customer data in diff
- [ ] If touching CLI: `--help` still renders cleanly
- [ ] If touching reports: at least one preset still renders end-to-end
